description:
Identify the single DICOM file in ~/DICOM/qa_task/ that contains a mismatched Patient ID. One file in this series of CT DICOM files has been intentionally altered to have a different Patient ID than the rest, causing it to be interpreted as a different patient. Extract the filename and the incorrect Patient ID of this anomalous file and record them in a report at ~/DICOM/exports/mismatch_report.txt using the following format:

Filename: <filename>
PatientID: <id>
